summary.en: For ordinary motor-driven power tools, Laos market files should include EMC evidence matching the sold tool, charger, battery pack, and electronic speed-control configuration. Connected tools with Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, cellular, or other radio modules may need MTPC or relevant communications-authority review before import or sale.
summary.zh: 普通电机驱动电动工具进入老挝时，市场文件应包含与销售工具、充电器、电池包及电子调速配置一致的 EMC 证据。带蓝牙、Wi-Fi、蜂窝或其他无线模块的联网工具，进口或销售前可能需要 MTPC 或相关通信主管机关审查。
summary.zht: 普通電機驅動電動工具進入寮國時，市場文件應包含與銷售工具、充電器、電池包及電子調速配置一致的 EMC 證據。帶藍牙、Wi-Fi、蜂窩或其他無線模組的聯網工具，進口或銷售前可能需要 MTPC 或相關通訊主管機關審查。

standards_or_laws: DOSM conformity certification for regulated electrical goods where applicable
MTPC or relevant Lao communications authority approval for radio equipment where applicable
IEC or CISPR based EMC evidence where adopted, accepted, or requested

summary.en: China files commonly include GB 4343 EMC evidence, GB 3883 safety evidence, and CCC baseline records where applicable. China wireless approvals, if any, do not automatically clear Lao radio requirements.
summary.zh: 中国文件通常包含 GB 4343 EMC 证据、GB 3883 安全证据，以及适用时的 CCC 基线记录。中国无线批准如有，也不会自动满足老挝无线要求。
summary.zht: 中國文件通常包含 GB 4343 EMC 證據、GB 3883 安全證據，以及適用時的 CCC 基線記錄。中國無線批准如有，也不會自動滿足寮國無線要求。

gap.en: The common gap is testing only the bare tool or relying on China EMC reports while omitting the Lao marketed charger, battery pack, radio module, antenna, firmware mode, or importer approval path.
gap.zh: 常见差距是仅测试裸工具，或依赖中国 EMC 报告而遗漏老挝销售配置中的充电器、电池包、无线模块、天线、固件模式或进口商批准路径。
gap.zht: 常見差距是僅測試裸工具，或依賴中國 EMC 報告而遺漏寮國銷售配置中的充電器、電池包、無線模組、天線、韌體模式或進口商批准路徑。

mandatory_status.target: EMC evidence may be required through DOSM or importer conformity review for regulated goods; radio approval is mandatory when the tool includes in-scope wireless transmitters.
mandatory_status.cn: China GB 4343 EMC and CCC baseline evidence supports the China file but does not replace Lao EMC, DOSM, or radio approval review.

source.publisher: Ministry of Technology and Communications, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Laos-ready for connected or electronically controlled tools until EMC evidence covers the complete marketed system and any wireless module is screened for Lao communications approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对联网或电子控制工具，在 EMC 证据覆盖完整销售系统并对任何无线模块完成老挝通信批准筛查前，不能视为老挝就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對聯網或電子控制工具，在 EMC 證據覆蓋完整銷售系統並對任何無線模組完成寮國通訊批准篩查前，不能視為寮國就緒。
